story.iWant: failing testlerin düzeltilmesi ve test infrastructure'ının refactoring ile uyumlu hale getirilmesi
story.soThat: npm run test ve test:e2e başarılı olsun ve kod değişikliklerinin doğruluğu otomatik olarak validate edilebilsin
story.tasks: - [ ] Task 1: Audit Current Test Status and Identify Failures (AC: 8.5-4.1, 8.5-4.2) - [ ] Task 2: Fix Jest Configuration and Module Resolution (AC: 8.5-4.6, 8.5-4.7) - [ ] Task 3: Create Common Test Mock Utilities (AC: 8.5-4.3) - [ ] Task 4: Fix Service Unit Tests - I18n and Logger Integration (AC: 8.5-4.1, 8.5-4.3) - [ ] Task 5: Fix Controller Unit Tests - I18n and Logger Integration (AC: 8.5-4.1, 8.5-4.3) - [ ] Task 6: Fix Guard and Interceptor Tests (AC: 8.5-4.1, 8.5-4.3) - [ ] Task 7: Configure Test Database and Prisma Test Client (AC: 8.5-4.5) - [ ] Task 8: Fix E2E Test Response Format Assertions (AC: 8.5-4.2, 8.5-4.4) - [ ] Task 9: Fix Import Errors and Deprecated Imports (AC: 8.5-4.7) - [ ] Task 10: Verify Test Isolation and Determinism (AC: 8.5-4.9) - [ ] Task 11: Verify Test Coverage and Add Missing Tests (AC: 8.5-4.8) - [ ] Task 12: Prepare for CI/CD Integration (AC: 8.5-4.10) - [ ] Task 13: Final Validation and Documentation (AC: 8.5-4.1, 8.5-4.2)

criterion.title: Unit testler başarılı
criterion.details: - `npm run test` komutu hatasız çalışıyor - Tüm service test'leri pass oluyor - Tüm controller test'leri pass oluyor - Tüm guard test'leri pass oluyor - Tüm interceptor test'leri pass oluyor - Hiçbir test fail, skip veya timeout olmuyor

criterion.title: E2E testler başarılı
criterion.details: - `npm run test:e2e` komutu hatasız çalışıyor - Tüm endpoint integration test'leri pass oluyor - Test database bağlantısı çalışıyor - Test isolation sağlanmış (testler birbirini etkilemiyor) - Response format assertions yeni format ile uyumlu

criterion.title: Test mock'ları refactoring ile uyumlu
criterion.details: - I18nService mock'u tüm ilgili test'lerde kullanılıyor - Logger mock'u tüm ilgili test'lerde kullanılıyor - BaseEntity ve BaseAuditEntity mock'ları kullanılıyor (eğer gerekiyorsa) - TransformResponseInterceptor mock'lanmış (eğer unit test'lerde gerekiyorsa)

criterion.title: Response format assertions güncellendi
criterion.details: - E2E test'ler yeni success response formatını kontrol ediyor - Paginated response assertions güncellendi - Error response assertions güncellendi

criterion.title: Test database configuration çalışıyor
criterion.details: - Test database environment variable'ları doğru configure edilmiş - Prisma test client doğru database'e bağlanıyor - Migration'lar test başlamadan önce otomatik çalışıyor - Test'ler arası database cleanup işliyor - Test database production/development database'ini etkilemiyor

criterion.title: Jest configuration güncel
criterion.details: - jest.config.js güncel ve doğru path mapping'ler var - Coverage threshold'lar tanımlı ve geçerli - Test environment doğru (node) - Module name mapper path alias'ları çalışıyor - Transform configuration TypeScript için doğru (ts-jest)

criterion.title: Import errors düzeltildi
criterion.details: - Tüm test dosyalarında import path'ler doğru - Deprecated import'lar güncellenmiş - Missing dependencies yok - TypeScript compile error'ları yok

criterion.title: Test coverage korundu
criterion.details: - Coverage oranı düşmedi (mevcut seviyede veya daha iyi) - Tüm critical path'ler test edilmiş - Service layer coverage yüksek (%80+) - Controller layer coverage yeterli (%70+)

criterion.title: Testler isolated ve deterministic
criterion.details: - Her test diğerinden bağımsız çalışıyor - Test execution order'ı sonucu etkilemiyor - No race conditions - No flaky tests (10 kez çalıştırıldığında 10 kez aynı sonuç) - Parallel execution destekliyor

criterion.title: CI/CD pipeline uyumlu
criterion.details: - Test'ler CI environment'ında çalışabilir durumda - Environment variable'lar CI için configure edilebilir - Test database CI ortamında kurulabilir - Test output CI-friendly - npm run test:ci script'i var ve çalışıyor

doc.title: Epic 8.5: Technical Refinement & Code Quality
doc.snippet: Test fixes story tanımı - Unit ve E2E testlerin düzeltilmesi, mock'ların güncellenmesi, test infrastructure'ın refactoring ile uyumlu hale getirilmesi

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: API Documentation (Swagger)
doc.section: Response Wrapper Classes and API Response Format
doc.snippet: API response format standardization - success, status, data, message yapısı. E2E testlerde bu format'a göre assertion yapılması gerekiyor.

doc.title: Story 8.5-1: Code Organization, Standards & Base Architecture
doc.snippet: Base class'lar (BaseEntity, BaseAuditEntity, BaseQueryDto) - Test mock'larında bu base class'lar için mock'lar oluşturulması gerekebilir

doc.title: Story 8.5-2: API Documentation & Response Standardization
doc.snippet: TransformResponseInterceptor oluşturuldu - E2E testlerde yeni response format'a göre assertion'lar güncellenmeli

doc.title: Story 8.5-3: Internationalization & Logging
doc.snippet: I18nService ve Logger tüm service ve controller'lara entegre edildi - Test'lerde bu service'ler için mock'lar eklenmesi gerekiyor

artifact.reason: Jest configuration for unit tests - rootDir: src, testRegex: .*\.spec\.ts$, transform: ts-jest
E2E test configuration - testRegex: .e2e-spec.ts$, setupFiles for test environment
Service test requiring I18nService and Logger mocks after Story 8.5-3 implementation
Service test requiring I18nService and Logger mocks
Controller test requiring I18nService and Logger mocks
New interceptor test from Story 8.5-2 - validates response transformation logic
Service to be mocked in all unit tests after Story 8.5-3 - provides t() method for translation
Service to be mocked in all unit tests - provides log(), error(), warn(), debug() methods
Global interceptor from Story 8.5-2 - wraps responses in { success, status, data, message } format

node.package: Testing framework for unit and integration tests
NestJS testing utilities and Test module
HTTP assertions library for E2E tests

constraints.constraint: Testing Strategy: Unit tests must mock all external dependencies (Prisma, I18nService, Logger, external APIs). Fast execution, no database, no network.
E2E Testing Strategy: Use actual test database (isolated from dev/prod). Test complete request-response flow through HTTP. Slower execution but critical for integration validation.
Test Organization: Unit tests co-located with source files (src/modules/*/__tests__/). E2E tests in test/ directory at project root.
Mock Strategy: External services always mocked (Prisma, S3, email, SMS). Internal services mocked in unit tests, real in E2E. I18nService and Logger mocked in unit tests.
Test Isolation: Each test independent, no shared state. Use beforeEach to reset mocks. Use afterEach to clean up. Tests must pass regardless of execution order.
Coverage Requirements: Service layer minimum 80%, Controller layer minimum 70%, Critical paths 100% (authentication, authorization).
Response Format: E2E tests must validate new response format from Story 8.5-2: { success, status, data, message } for success, { success, status, data, count, message } for paginated.
Test Database: Use separate test database (DATABASE_URL_TEST). Run migrations before E2E tests. Clean data between tests. Must not affect production/development databases.
Jest Configuration: rootDir: src for unit tests, testEnvironment: node, transform: ts-jest, moduleNameMapper for path aliases (@/common, @/modules).
Dependencies: This story depends on Stories 8.5-1, 8.5-2, 8.5-3 being completed. Test updates align with base classes, response format, and i18n/logger integration.

interface.name: Logger methods
interface.signature: log(message: string, context?: string): void; error(message: string, trace?: string, context?: string): void; warn(message: string, context?: string): void; debug(message: string, context?: string): void

interface.name: Success Response Format
interface.signature: { success: true, status: number, data: T, message: string }

interface.name: Paginated Response Format
interface.signature: { success: true, status: number, data: T[], count: number, message: string }
interface.path: Global response format for paginated endpoints

interface.name: Error Response Format
interface.signature: { success: false, status: number, message: string, errors?: any[] }

tests.standards: Unit tests use NestJS Testing module with Test.createTestingModule(). All external dependencies mocked using jest.fn(). AAA pattern (Arrange-Act-Assert) followed. E2E tests use supertest for HTTP assertions. Test naming: describe blocks for class/feature, it blocks start with 'should'. Test files: *.spec.ts for unit, *.e2e-spec.ts for E2E. Coverage thresholds: Services 80%+, Controllers 70%+. Test database isolated from dev/prod with cleanup between tests. Mock utilities created in test/utils/ for reusable I18nService, Logger, and Prisma mocks.

locations.location: src/modules/*/__tests__/*.spec.ts - Unit tests for services, controllers
test/utils/ - Shared test utilities and mocks (to be created)

ideas.idea: Run npm run test, capture all failures, categorize by type (mock issues, import errors, assertion failures), create prioritized fix list
Run npm run test:e2e, identify database connection issues, test isolation problems, response format assertion failures
Create reusable mock utilities: mockI18nService with t() returning key, mockLogger with all log methods, mockPrismaService helpers, export from test/utils/index.ts
Update all service tests to include I18nService mock in providers array, verify i18n.t() calls with correct keys
Update all controller and service tests to include Logger mock, verify appropriate logging calls

Update E2E response assertions to check new format: expect(res.body).toHaveProperty('success', true), expect(res.body).toHaveProperty('status'), expect(res.body).toHaveProperty('data'), expect(res.body).toHaveProperty('message')
Create helper function for E2E response validation: validateSuccessResponse(body, expectedStatus), validatePaginatedResponse(body), validateErrorResponse(body, expectedStatus)
Create .env.test file with DATABASE_URL_TEST, configure Prisma test client, implement beforeAll hook to run migrations, implement afterEach hook for data cleanup
Review jest.config.js in package.json: verify moduleNameMapper for path aliases, check transform config, verify testEnvironment is 'node', update coverage thresholds if needed
Scan all test files for import errors using grep, update deprecated imports, fix path aliases, verify all TypeScript types resolve correctly
Run npm run test:cov to generate coverage report, identify uncovered critical paths, add missing unit tests for new base classes and interceptor from Story 8.5-2
Test isolation: Run tests 10 times to check for flakiness, run with --shuffle flag to verify order independence, run with --maxWorkers=4 to test parallel execution, fix any race conditions
Create test:ci script in package.json with --ci flag, configure CI-friendly reporters, document test database setup for Docker/CI, ensure tests run without local environment dependencies
